sentences.text: You probably unmute yourself in the bottom left corner of the screen.

Well, uh, thanks for jumping on.
Have you been able to log into rentable yet?
Uh Let's make sure that you have access.
Does it look like you do so we can try to log in together?
I'll give you access right now just so that you can follow along.
So if you wanna go to uh www dot
rable dot Let's co K without the M
Let me know once you're there.
I think I'm on the front page.
My internet is being really slow.
So once I add you, we can try to log in, but for the time being, you can just follow along and then we'll, we'll try to get you logged in by the end of the call.
Ok, I'm gonna share my screen.
So you now have access and your property is being listed on rentable and then our affiliate networks as well.
So if you haven't already, you should start to receive some leads.
Um I'll be your point of contact.
So if you ever noticed maybe that your leads are unqualified or we need to adjust how your property is listed.
Um So yeah, this is the page that you'll see when you go ahead and log in.
So you'll have access to everybody's properties, but of course you're only concerned about yours.
So you can kind of filter that down.
Um, but you'll be able to view the property and edit the property from here.
Uh, remind me, are you using a property management software?
Um So all of your updates with your property and your units and availability, most everything will be done through ResMed.
Um However, there are a few things that you can use the back end for which I'll show you.
Um, one of them being how leads are delivered So currently we have leads going to this email and to this phone number.
So whenever you get a lead, you'll get it through an email and to respond to that lead, all you need to do is re uh reply directly to that email.
If you ever have any questions when that comes up.
Uh but that's how leads will be delivered.
They should come through as a rentable lead.
Again all of your photos, this is everything that's been feeding through uh via ResMed.
Do these look like the correct photos that you wanna advertise?
Uh If you have any additional of course, throw them in the ResMed, they should feed to us by the end of the day.
Uh features and amenities policies and details all of that also comes directly through ResMed.
So won't need to make any updates here.
Do y'all ever run any specials or concessions at your property?
Do you mind telling me just a little bit about Pied Ridge?
Um This is what we have for the description I just recently did this I think for uh Ranchitos Village.
I kind of tweaked how the wording was.
So people knew that that property was disability and um rent monitored.
So we can do that for you if you're ever noticing that your leads aren't really qualified.
We can change this up a bit.

However, um you'll be able to check your leads and your analytics through the back end, which I recommend doing
You'll just access the analytics tab over here on the left hand side
and you'll be able to kind of just go down to your property once you've been on for a while to see how many leads you've gotten over a certain period of time.
So we just went live, I think maybe yesterday or the day before.
So over the weekend, we'll start getting leads.
Where are you at right now?
We have, we have two vacants, but we only have one that's not promised to anyone yet.
So hopefully we can get that lease set pretty quick.
Um But if you ever, you know, you need to look to see who these leads were, maybe you lost the email or whatever.
Um have it, you can go into the lead section and search for them this way as well.

So, really simple and straightforward, I'll make sure that you have access to this back end, but I think the main takeaways are to make your updates through resume if you um I always like to say for the first edit that you make, just let me know so that I can make sure that it fed through properly and make sure that we have all the right information.
Um You can check your leads through the back end pretty simple.
But do you have any questions or anything that um you need me to cover again?

Ok, if you have any issues with that, let me know and I can loop in my support team.

Have you been able to follow up with those leads?

Um Yeah, keep me updated if the leads are good quality or whatever.
Um I'll see what I can do to help.
It was great meeting you let me know if you need anything else, uh, but have a great weekend.
